rows.label: tlk45370152_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Ahhh! Damn Acedia!
They had to meddle!

rows.label: tlk45370152_04_msg0002
rows.name:
We can't afford to feed
the people fleeing Acedia!

rows.label: tlk45370152_04_msg0003
rows.name:
City repairs aren't cheap either!
No budget will ever be enough!

rows.label: tlk45370152_04_msg0004
rows.name:
Ugh[ML:Dash ] My head is spinning[ML:Dash ]
A vein in my head might burst[ML:Dash ]
